title: coffea grandifolia
intro: Coffea grandifolia, also known as the large-leaf coffee, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to Madagascar and the surrounding islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its high content of alkaloids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Coffea grandifolia include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as the potential to improve cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Coffea grandifolia can be made from its leaves, which can be steeped in hot water to create a tea, or used in various forms of extracts and supplements.
